hooks.command: files=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM); [ -z "$files" ] && exit 0; runner='pnpm exec prettier'; pnpm exec prettier --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || runner='pnpm dlx prettier@3.9.5'; git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM -z | xargs -0 $runner --write --ignore-unknown >/dev/null 2>&1; git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM -z | xargs -0 git add --; exit 0
